title: Assessing the effect of therapeutic level of oxytetracycline dihydrate on pharmacokinetics and biosafety in Oncorhynchus mykiss (Walbaum, 1792)

errors.description: The error is that negative values are reported for pharmacokinetic parameters such as AUC, elimination rates, and LOQ in Table 1, which are nonsensical since these parameters should always be positive based on their definitions in pharmacokinetics and analytical chemistry.
